jsonLd.title: FabHotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
